title: repair a phased cascade (P0006 -> E0103 -> E0301)
statement: This program does not compile. It has more than one defect, and the compiler reports them in phases — fixing the first reveals the next. Repair ALL defects so it compiles clean and `main` returns 14 (two `combine`s of `Acc{total:3}` and `Acc{total:4}`, with the guard not taken). The reported diagnostic is only the first one; keep the observable result.
